title: cattleya × verelii
intro: Cattleya × verelii, also known as the Orchid of the Incas, is a hybrid orchid plant that belongs to the Cattleya genus and is a cross between Cattleya warscewiczii and Cattleya nobilior. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cattleya × verelii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
